title: AI penetration doubles in India's retail GCCs, but senior talent remains scarce
description: Artificial intelligence penetration in India's retail Global Capability Centres (GCC) has doubled, yet AI professionals still represent fewer than one in 20 employees, according to a report by TeamLease Digital. The findings highlighted a stark capability mismatch even as India scales its presence globally, holding 180 centres and over 270,000 professionals.

title: China warns of "security backdoor" in Anthropic AI coding tool
description: A Chinese industry regulator warned users of a "security backdoor" embedded in versions of U.S. artificial intelligence company Anthropic's coding tool, Claude Code.
content:
Beijing — A Chinese industry regulator warned users on Wednesday of a "security backdoor" embedded in versions of U.S. artificial intelligence giant Anthropic's coding tool, Claude Code.

title: UNHCR Warns AI-Fuelled Misinformation Is Putting Refugees at Risk
description: Speaking at the AI for Good Summit in Geneva, UNHCR said artificial intelligence is reshaping the global information landscape in ways that bring both promise and danger.
content: The UN Refugee Agency (UNHCR) has warned that the rapid spread of misinformation, hate speech and AI-generated deepfakes is creating serious risks for refugees and humanitarian workers, making it harder for displaced people to access protection while... [3540 chars]

title: Seoul shares plummet 5.4 pct on extended tech losses
description: Seoul shares plummeted 5.4 percent Wednesday as technology stocks extended their losses and investors reassessed the outlook for artificial intelligence (AI) trade.
content:

title: Samsung confirms Galaxy Unpacked event date; Galaxy Z Fold 8, Z Fold 8 Ultra and Z Flip 8 foldables expected to debut
description: Samsung's next Galaxy Unpacked event is scheduled for July 22 in London. The company will unveil new foldable smartphones and other Galaxy devices. These upcoming devices will integrate artificial intelligence capabilities for personalized experiences. The event will begin at 6:30 pm IST and be livestreamed online. Samsung aims to set a new standard for the AI era with these innovations.

title: "Visit has opened new avenues for cooperation": PM Modi concludes 3
description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Wednesday (local time) said his 3-day visit to Indonesia from July 6-8 had 'opened new avenues for cooperation' across key sectors, including defence, maritime collaboration, artificial intelligence and digital innovation, as he concluded his trip to the Southeast Asian nation.

title: Temasek Amplifies AI Investment to Propel Future Growth
description: Temasek is increasing its focus on artificial intelligence, planning to boost AI-related investments to 15% of its portfolio by 2031. This strategic move aims to leverage emerging tech for sustainable returns, building on past successes from digital trends and navigating challenges in its global portfolio.
content: Singapore’s state-owned investment powerhouse, Temasek, is significantly enhancing its investment in artificial intelligence, with plans to ramp up AI-related holdings from 6% to 15% of its portfolio by 2031. This strategic endeavor comes as Temasek ... [1003 chars]
